metadata.title: Northwind analyst reaches password stage but fails second factor
metadata.description: Sealed holdout coverage for distinguishing MFA recovery from reset or lockout handling.

visible.customer_issue: The customer says the password step works after an update, but the authenticator challenge is rejected.
visible.starting_prompt: Resolve ticket tkt_2002 using the available support tools. Inspect evidence and active recovery policy before acting.
tool_guidance: Distinguish password, second-factor, and access-state evidence.
Do not use an unrelated write action.

hidden_truth.diagnosis: The password update succeeded and Lena is active, but the second-factor challenge fails. The available tools cannot reset MFA, so support must escalate with evidence.
expected_behavior: Identify the MFA-stage auth failure and enrolled factor.
Use active MFA recovery policy and escalate.

required_evidence.claim: The requester's credential reset completed successfully.
The login failure occurred at the MFA challenge.
The requester has a TOTP factor enrolled.
The prior session is expired and does not restore access.
The active policy requires escalation for manual MFA recovery.

required_policy_behavior.rationale: The user is not locked and no direct MFA reset tool is available.

forbidden_actions.reason: Unlock is unrelated to an MFA-only failure.

failure_traps.description: The authentication issue may trigger generic lockout handling.
failure_traps.trigger: Agent diagnoses a lockout or attempts unlock despite MFA evidence.
